Video.summary: The high-octane energy of Monster Jam ignites Hartford, Connecticut, as the superstars of the Arena Championship Series East descend upon People's Bank Arena. Rivalries reach a boiling point when the Robbins brothers, Montana and Triton, face off in a high-stakes "family affair" at the starting line, while points leader Jon Zimmer Jr. in Terminal Velocity battles to defend his top spot against the "fastest in the field," Coty Saucier in Dragon. Fans are treated to a masterclass in precision and raw power across three grueling competitions: the high-speed JCB Racing, the gravity-defying Two-Wheel Skills Challenge, and a chaotic Freestyle Challenge. With every point crucial for the series leaderboard, legends like Krysten Anderson in Grave Digger and Jon Zimmer in Megalodon must push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute edge to claim the event championship.
Video.title: PeoplesBank Arena - Hartford, CT

Video.summary: Strap in for epic racing and freestyle action from the Citrus Bowl on January 31, 2014.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL

Video.summary: The fun keeps rolling with freestyle action from Orlando Citrus Bowl, on January 28, 2012.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Buckle in for all the epic racing and freestyle action from Raymond James Stadium, on February 5, 2011.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series Red returns to Minneapolis as Vendetta’s Mike Christensen looks to win back to back Overall Event Championship while Grave Digger’s Adam Anderson attempts to finally regain the series points lead over Bakugan Dragonoid’s Camden Murphy.
Video.title: US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN

Video.summary: Monster Jam heads to Minnesota as the battle for the series championship rages on between Bakugan Dragonoid’s Camden Murphy and Grave Digger’s Adam Anderson. New contenders have emerged as Cole Venard tries to lead the Black Pearl to another event win and Mike Christensen looks to take Vendetta to back to back freestyle victories.
Video.title: US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN

Video.summary: Monster Jam visits Arnhem, Netherlands with the racing action from the Gelredome, on September 26, 2010.
Video.title: GelreDome - Arnhem, Netherlands - Racing

Video.summary: Monster jam's 2010 season continues with racing action from the Edward Jones Dome, on February 6, 2010.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing

Image.alt: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam Stadium Championship Series West kicks off in Oracle Park for the first time in seventeen years. Colt Stephens begins defense of his World Finals Freestyle Championship while Ryan and Adam Anderson compete on the same series for the first time since 2021. It’s Grave Digger vs Son Uva Digger in San Francisco.
Video.title: Oracle Park - San Francisco, CA

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series Blue returns to NRG Stadium for another action-packed round. Son-Uva Digger’s Ryan Anderson tries to win his second consecutive Overall Event Championship while Grave Digger driver Tyler Menninga looks to continue his racing dominance as he goes for 18-racing wins in a row. Find out when Monster Jam heads back to Houston for Round 6.
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2022 season continues with round 15 of the Stadium Championship Series, at Ford Field in Detroit, MI.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into the Orlando Citrus Bowl, on January 29, 2011.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Racing

Video.summary: All the racing and freestyle action from Angel Stadium on January 25, 2020.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam visits UTEP Sun Bowl Stadium with all the racing, skills, and freestyle action.
Video.title: UTEP Sun Bowl Stadium - El Paso, TX

Image.alt: UTEP Sun Bowl Stadium - El Paso, TX
UTEP Sun Bowl Stadium - El Paso, TX
UTEP Sun Bowl Stadium - El Paso, TX

Video.summary: Things are heating up as Monster Jam's 2001 season heads to the Georgia Dome in Atlanta, GA! It's time for racing action from your favorite trucks and drivers.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into Edward Jones Dome on February 5, 2015.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO

Video.summary: Check out the first half of freestyle action from Sam Boyd Stadium on March 22, 2014.
Video.title: World Finals XV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle - Part 1/2

Image.alt: World Finals XV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle - Part 1/2
World Finals XV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle - Part 1/2
World Finals XV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle - Part 1/2

Video.summary: The high-octane energy of the Arena Championship Series East hits the Steel City as Monster Jam takes over PPG Paints Arena in Pittsburgh. This episode features elite drivers pushing their 12,000-pound machines to the limit in JCB Racing, the technical Skills Challenge, and a spectacular Freestyle finale. Watch as the intensity peaks with a high-stakes family showdown between Jon Zimmer and his son, Jon Zimmer Jr., and follow the inspiring journey of MJ Solorio as he transforms from a "super fan to superstar" behind the wheel of El Toro Loco. From the legendary rivalry of Grave Digger to Coty Saucier's masterful performance in Dragon, witness a night of shattered limits and epic dirt-shredding action.
Video.title: PPG Paints Arena - Pittsburgh, PA

Video.summary: Get ready for Adam Anderson - the new King of the Anderson family dynasty! Join us as we highlight his best freestyles behind the wheel of Grave Digger and Grave Digger: The Legend.
Video.title: Adam Anderson Freestyles Compilation

Video.summary: Even when there's rain or mud, these monster trucks bring their A-Game. Get down and dirty with this compilation of muddy Monster Jam trucks! AND - Witness some of the best freestyles ever to hit the World Finals field from 2000 to 2011.
Video.title: Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks

Image.alt: Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks
Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks
Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks

Video.summary: Arena Championship Series Central takes over the historic Greensboro Coliseum as Dragon’s Coty Saucier brings his series points lead to North Carolina. Reigning World Finals Racing Champion, Brandon Vinson tries to lead Grave Digger to the Overall Event Championship while Tony Ochs looks to take a bite out of the competition in the brand-new ThunderROARus.
Video.title: Greensboro Coliseum - Greensboro, NC

Video.summary: It’s a special international edition of Monster Jam from London Stadium. See the highly anticipated debut of the four Marvel Monster Jam trucks Thor, Ironman, Spider-Man, and Black Panther. See them go head-to-head against MaxD, Grave Digger, El Toro Loco, and Megalodon for the Overall Event Championship.
Video.title: London Stadium - London, England

Video.summary: Don't miss the Monster Jam kickoff to the Path of Destruction tour at M&T Bank Stadium in Baltimore, MD.
Video.title: M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD

Video.summary: Check out the excitement at Edward Jones Dome in St. Louis, MO during Monster Jam's 2014 season.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO

Video.summary: The 2012 season of Monster Jam continues on at the Citrus Bowl in Orlando, FL.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2014 season at Georgia Dome in Atlanta, GA featuring Championship race and freestyle competitions.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA

Video.summary: It’s the dramatic finale of the Fall Stadium Series from State Farm Stadium in Glendale, Arizona! In this special "Sparkle Smash Bash" event celebrating Kayla Blood and her truck.Tyler Menninga (Grave Digger) dominates the racing bracket, while Tristan England (JCB Digatron) shows incredible control in the Skills Challenge. The drama peaks in Freestyle as Camden Murphy (Classroom Crusher) attempts a comeback, but Armando Castro (El Toro Loco) fights to secure his first-ever Stadium Series Championship.
Video.title: State Farm Stadium - Glendale, AZ
